ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male or female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Passenger fare */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Embarkation port (S, C, or Q) */,
  "survived" TEXT /* Survival status (0 or 1) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number or location of the passenger */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number for the passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the passenger's travel (e.g., business, leisure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers that can be accommodated in the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of the amenities available in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port (S, C, or Q) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal or terminal area of the port */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city where the port is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare (e.g., adult, child, infant) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fare is denominated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the fare (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_rates" (
  "survival_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival rate */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of passengers in this class and sex */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the passengers (e.g., child, adult, senior) */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Travel class of the passengers (e.g., economy, business, first) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_rates_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "passenger_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-class combination */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Boarding time of the passenger */,
  "assigned_seat" TEXT /* Assigned seat number for the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_classes_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_classes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_ports" (
  "passenger_port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-port combination */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port */,
  "boarding_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger boarded the ship */,
  "disembarkation_date" TEXT /* Date the passenger disembarked from the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_ports_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_ports_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Sex of the passenger (male or female)
